metadata.name: Energy Sector - Sample Knowledge Graph
metadata.description: Simplified sample Knowledge Graph for environmental compliance in oil & gas operations
metadata.regulatory_framework: Clean Air Act, Clean Water Act

rules.subject: Facility discharge
rules.reasoning: The regulation explicitly states facilities producing sulfur dioxide must maintain discharge levels below 100 ppm at all times

rules.subject: Sulfur dioxide emissions monitoring
rules.reasoning: Regulation requires continuous monitoring with measurements taken at 15-minute intervals

rules.subject: Nitrogen oxide emissions
rules.reasoning: State regulation limits nitrogen oxide emissions to 75 ppm during operating hours (6 AM to 10 PM)

rules.subject: Wastewater discharge pH
rules.reasoning: Water quality standards require pH between 6.0 and 8.5 for aquatic life protection

rules.subject: Monthly compliance report
rules.reasoning: Facility operators must submit monthly compliance reports to regulatory authority by established deadline

precedence_rules.explanation: State regulations take precedence when more stringent than federal requirements
